gsx$flavortext: From the warm rays of the inviting sun, the stairs spiral into chilling darkness...

gsx$ability: The first time a Creature loses an Elemental Type this turn, it loses 10 Energy.
gsx$flavortext: ...plunging into the void until a faint glow illuminates from bellow, a light not so inviting.

gsx$ability: At the beginning of combat, all Creatures gain Fire.
gsx$flavortext: The land melts, boils and erupts, creating an ever-shifting landscape.

gsx$ability:
Engaged Creatures have "Outperform Power 5."
Damage dealt by Speed Attacks is reduced by 5.
gsx$flavortext: The UnderWorlders are fair - all are guilty until proven innocent.

gsx$ability: The engaged Creature with the lowest Speed plays attacks at random.
gsx$flavortext: The scars of war remain long after the battle is over.

gsx$ability: At the beginning of combat, all Creatures gain Air.
gsx$flavortext:
"Someone must have carved these statues. So where are they?" 
—Tiaane

gsx$ability: The engaged Creature with the lowest Courage fails all Checks on attacks it plays.
gsx$flavortext: Night flows like a river here.

gsx$ability: When this becomes the active Location, each player draws two Attack Cards, then discards two Attack Cards.
gsx$flavortext: Though Vidav wants peace, his battle tactics are undeniably the best.

gsx$ability: Attacks that would deal more than 20 damage to Creatures with Earth deal 20 damage instead.
gsx$flavortext: Since Aszil opened the Tremor Gate, the very bedrock of Silchaw's mine has gone mad!

gsx$ability: All attacks count as Fire attacks.
gsx$flavortext:
"Maybe we should look for another way in." 
—Mezzmarr

gsx$name: Carnival of Confusion, The Entangled Throne
gsx$ability: When an attack is played, flip a coin. If heads, that attack deals double damage. If tails, that attack deals 0 damage.
gsx$flavortext: Here your fate rests with your fortune.

gsx$ability: At the beginning of combat, if an engaged Creature has higher Wisdom than the opposing engaged Creature, put a Mugic counter on it
gsx$flavortext: It's rumored that the most vicious Creature in Perim is imprisoned here, but only Chaor truly knows.

gsx$ability: At the beginning of combat, if an engaged Creature has lower Courage than the opposing engaged Creature, it loses 10 Energy.
gsx$flavortext: No matter how far you run, you can never escape a nightmare.

gsx$ability: OverWorld Creatures have an additional 10 Energy.
gsx$flavortext:
"We will rebuild our home on the ruins of Old Kiru. The UnderWorlders may have destroyed our city, but they can never destroy our spirit!" 
—Maxxor

gsx$ability:
At the beginning of combat, flip a coin. If heads, put a Mugic counter on your engaged Creature. If tails, put a Mugic counter on the opposing engaged Creature.
Creatures with one or more Mugic counters have an additional 10 Energy.

When a Battlegear is put into a general discard pile, put a Scrap Counter on Khybon's Scrapyard. Then, if it has three or more Scrap counters, return up to one Battlegear Card from your general discard pile to play equipped to an unequipped Creature you control and your opponent reveals a new active Location.
UnderWorld Mugic Costs 1 additional Mugic counter to play.
gsx$flavortext: This frozen, remote region is home to Blügon and other frosty Creatures.
gsx$artist: Keith Conroy, David Curiel, A Clipart snowman

gsx$ability: All attacks count as Air attacks.
At the beginning of combat, each player can return a Mugic Card from their general discard pile to their hand.
gsx$flavortext: This strange stronghold is built in a style that might best be called "bizzarechitecture."

gsx$ability: At the beginning of combat, if an engaged Creature has higher Wisdom than the opposing engaged Creature, put a Mugic counter on it.
Mugic and activated abilities cannot be played.
gsx$flavortext: The few who have survived utter nary a word of what lies beyond.

gsx$ability: Battlegear have no abilities and cannot gain abilities.
gsx$flavortext: The frequent quakes that rock the UnderWorld are blamed on the instability of this once-might prop.

gsx$ability:
When this becomes the active Location, Creatures lose all Elemental Types. If a Creature lost Fire, it gains Water. If a Creature lost Water, it gains Air. If a Creature lost Air, it gains Earth. If a Creature lost Earth, it gains Fire.
Elemental Attacks deal an additional 5 damage.
At the beginning of combat, engaged Creatures gain Fire, Water, Air, and Earth.
At the beginning of combat, engaged Elementalist Creatures gain an Elemental type of their controller's choice.
gsx$flavortext: Flat, dry, inhospitable. Perfect!

gsx$ability: Creatures with Earth have "Range" and "Swift 1."
gsx$flavortext: The dark whirlwind descends, enveloping you in its black, velvet grip... and never lets go.

gsx$ability: Mirage: When an Attack Card is played by a Creature in this space, its controller can flip a coin. If tails, that player sacrifices his engaged Creature. If heads, the attack deals an additional 10 damage, and that player can flip again.

gsx$name: (Unused) Nest of the Ancestors, Under Siege
gsx$artist: Keith Conroy, Khary Randolph, Adrian Barrios, Emilio Lopez
